ApiErrorResponse.description:
Standard error ``detail`` object for 4xx/5xx business and security failures.

Attributes:
    code: Project-wide stable error code.
    key: Machine-readable key for clients.
    message: Human-readable English message.
    source: Origin layer (e.g. ``business``, ``security``).
ApiErrorResponse.title: ApiErrorResponse

LiveResponse.description:
``GET /live`` — process up signal without dependency checks.

Attributes:
    status: Fixed literal ``alive`` for a healthy process.
    app_env: Active ``APP_ENV`` profile (``dev``, ``qa``, ``prod``).

app_env.description: Logical deployment profile from APP_ENV (dev, qa, prod).
app_env.title: App Env

LiveResponse.title: LiveResponse

ReadyResponse.description:
``GET /ready`` — dependency checks (used with HTTP 200 or 503).

Attributes:
    status: ``ready`` or ``not_ready`` depending on checks.
    checks: Map of check name to short state string (e.g. ``database``).
    db_latency_ms: Observed database round-trip in milliseconds, if measured.
ReadyResponse.title: ReadyResponse

UserCreateRequest.description:
JSON body for ``POST /api/v1/user`` (validated before idempotency and service layer).

``system_user_id`` and ``system_uuid`` form the composite natural key (DB unique constraint).
Field-level rules, OpenAPI examples, and timezone validation live on the ``Field``
definitions and :data:`app.schemas.enums.TimezoneField`.

system_user_id.description: User ID in the source system; unique together with `system_uuid`.
system_user_id.title: System User Id

system_uuid.description: UUID of the source system (`systems.system_uuid`); composite key with `system_user_id`.
system_uuid.title: System Uuid

UserCreateRequest.title: UserCreateRequest

UserCreateResponse.description:
User resource returned by create (201), get (200), update (200), and patch (200); maps ORM :class:`~app.models.core.user.User`.

Attributes:
    client_uuid: Internal client identifier (UUID string).
    created_at: Row creation timestamp (timezone-aware).
    updated_at: Last update timestamp (timezone-aware).
    is_row_invalid: Soft-invalidation flag (0 or 1).
    invalidation_reason_uuid: FK to invalidation reason, if set.
    system_user_id: External system user id when present.
    system_uuid: Related system UUID when present.
    username: Optional display username.
    full_name: Required full name.
    timezone: IANA timezone string stored for the user.
UserCreateResponse.title: UserCreateResponse

UserPatchRequest.description: JSON body for ``PATCH /api/v1/user/{system_uuid}/{system_user_id}`` — partial update; omit fields to leave unchanged.

full_name.description: Full name; omit to leave unchanged.
full_name.title: Full Name

invalidation_reason_uuid.description: Invalidation reason UUID; set null to clear.
invalidation_reason_uuid.title: Invalidation Reason Uuid

system_uuid.description: Related system UUID; set null to clear.
system_uuid.title: System Uuid

timezone.description: IANA timezone; omit to leave unchanged.
timezone.title: Timezone

username.description: Username or login; set null to clear.
username.title: Username

UserPatchRequest.title: UserPatchRequest

UserUpdateRequest.description: JSON body for ``PUT /api/v1/user/{system_uuid}/{system_user_id}`` — full replacement of mutable profile fields.

system_uuid.description: Related system UUID; set null to clear.
system_uuid.title: System Uuid

UserUpdateRequest.title: UserUpdateRequest

ValidationErrorItem.description:
Single entry in the ``errors`` array of a 422 response.

Attributes:
    code: Stable validation error code (e.g. ``USER_001``).
    key: Machine-readable key.
    message: Human-readable message for this failure.
    field: JSON field name when applicable.
    source: Always ``validation`` for this model.
    details: Raw Pydantic context (``loc``, ``type``, ``input``, etc.).
ValidationErrorItem.title: ValidationErrorItem

ValidationErrorResponse.description:
Top-level body for HTTP 422 validation failures.

Attributes:
    error_type: Fixed discriminator (e.g. ``validation_error``).
    endpoint: ``METHOD path`` string for the failing request.
    errors: List of :class:`ValidationErrorItem` entries.
ValidationErrorResponse.title: ValidationErrorResponse

post.description:
Creates a new user; uniqueness is `(system_user_id, system_uuid)`. Requires `Idempotency-Key` header for safe retry semantics.

### Example request (curl)
```bash
curl -X POST 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/user' \
  -H 'accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'X-API-Key: ....' \
  -H 'Idempotency-Key: create-user-sample-1' \
  -d '{"system_user_id":"2","system_uuid":"b2c3d4e5-0002-4000-8000-000000000002","full_name":"Ivan Petrov"}'
```

parameters.description: Required idempotency key for write deduplication. Use printable ASCII only (no Cyrillic/Unicode).
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

schema.description: Required idempotency key for write deduplication. Use printable ASCII only (no Cyrillic/Unicode).
schema.title: Idempotency-Key

value.message: Missing required `Idempotency-Key` header for write operation.
User with this `system_user_id` and `system_uuid` already exists.
Missing or invalid API key in header `X-API-Key`.

401.description: Missing or invalid API key header.

value.message: Idempotency key was already used with another payload.

409.description: Idempotency key was reused with different payload.

value.message: Request body exceeds configured maximum size.

413.description: Request body exceeds configured maximum size.

ctx.error: invalid character: expected an optional prefix of `urn:uuid:` followed by [0-9a-fA-F-], found `b` at 1

errors.message: Field `invalidation_reason_uuid` must be a valid UUID.

ctx.error: invalid character: expected an optional prefix of `urn:uuid:` followed by [0-9a-fA-F-], found `n` at 1

errors.message: Field `system_uuid` must be a valid UUID.
Field `timezone` must be a valid IANA timezone.

422.description: Request validation errors for all supported user create field rules.

value.message: Too many requests. Retry later.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until request can be retried.

get.description:
Returns user profile by composite key `(system_uuid, system_user_id)`.

### Example request (curl)
```bash
curl -X GET 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/user/b2c3d4e5-0002-4000-8000-000000000002/2' \
  -H 'accept: application/json' \
  -H 'X-API-Key: ....'
```

value.message: Missing or invalid API key in header `X-API-Key`.

401.description: Missing or invalid API key header.

value.message: User with this `system_user_id` and `system_uuid` was not found.
Too many requests. Retry later.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until request can be retried.

get.summary: Get user by system_uuid and system_user_id

patch.description:
Updates only the fields present in the JSON body; omitted fields stay unchanged. Requires `Idempotency-Key`. Use `PUT` for a full replacement of mutable fields.

### Example request (curl)
```bash
curl -X PATCH 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/user/b2c3d4e5-0002-4000-8000-000000000002/2' \
  -H 'accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'X-API-Key: ....' \
  -H 'Idempotency-Key: patch-user-sample-1' \
  -d '{"full_name":"Maria Petrova"}'
```

parameters.description: Required idempotency key for write deduplication. Use printable ASCII only (no Cyrillic/Unicode).
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

schema.description: Required idempotency key for write deduplication. Use printable ASCII only (no Cyrillic/Unicode).
schema.title: Idempotency-Key

value.message: Missing required `Idempotency-Key` header for write operation.
PATCH body must include at least one field to update.
Missing or invalid API key in header `X-API-Key`.

401.description: Missing or invalid API key header.

value.message: User with this `system_user_id` and `system_uuid` was not found.
Idempotency key was already used with another payload.

409.description: Idempotency key was reused with different payload.

value.message: Request body exceeds configured maximum size.

413.description: Request body exceeds configured maximum size.

errors.message: Field `timezone` must be a valid IANA timezone.

422.description: Request validation errors for user patch body rules.

value.message: Too many requests. Retry later.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until request can be retried.

patch.summary: Partially update user by system_uuid and system_user_id

put.description:
Updates mutable profile fields for an existing user. Requires `Idempotency-Key` for safe retry semantics.

### Example request (curl)
```bash
curl -X PUT 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/user/b2c3d4e5-0002-4000-8000-000000000002/2' \
  -H 'accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'X-API-Key: ....' \
  -H 'Idempotency-Key: update-user-sample-1' \
  -d '{"full_name":"Ivan Petrov","timezone":"Europe/Moscow","is_row_invalid":0}'
```

parameters.description: Required idempotency key for write deduplication. Use printable ASCII only (no Cyrillic/Unicode).
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

schema.description: Required idempotency key for write deduplication. Use printable ASCII only (no Cyrillic/Unicode).

value.message: Request body exceeds configured maximum size.

413.description: Request body exceeds configured maximum size.

put.summary: Update user by system_uuid and system_user_id

get.description:
Kubernetes-style liveness: process is up (no dependency checks).

Returns:
    Payload with ``status="alive"`` and current ``app_env``.

Readiness probe including database connectivity and latency budget.

Returns:
    ``ReadyResponse`` with HTTP 200 when ready, or HTTP 503 with the same schema
    when the DB check fails or exceeds the timeout.

tags.description: User identity lifecycle endpoints with idempotency and contract-driven errors.
